# Carat Capital

> The trade paper of the jewelry world — original, sourced daily reporting on diamonds, gold and precious metals, colored gemstones, watches, jewelry auctions, and jewelry retail and technology. Published at https://caratcapital.org. All articles are original writing with named, linked sources; prices are dated and indicative.

## The paper
- [Front page](https://caratcapital.org/): today's edition, the wire, and the live price tape
- [The Record](https://caratcapital.org/the-record.html): a dated, sourced week-by-week chronicle of the industry
- [The Almanac](https://caratcapital.org/almanac.html): the quarter's key numbers in sourced tables (metals, exports, prices, auctions, retail)
- [The Field Guide](https://caratcapital.org/field-guide.html): plain-language introduction to how the jewelry trade works
- [About & editorial standards](https://caratcapital.org/about.html)
- [RSS feed](https://caratcapital.org/feed.xml)
- [Morning Brief newsletter](https://caratcapital.beehiiv.com): free daily email, 06:30 ET

## The six desks
- [Diamonds](https://caratcapital.org/diamonds.html): the stone that runs on trust
- [Gold & Metals](https://caratcapital.org/gold-metals.html): the metal beneath every margin
- [Colored Gemstones](https://caratcapital.org/gemstones.html): supply lines drawn in emerald, ruby and sapphire
- [Watches](https://caratcapital.org/watches.html): haute horlogerie, priced by the second
- [Auctions & Estates](https://caratcapital.org/auctions.html): where the trade marks itself to market
- [Retail & Technology](https://caratcapital.org/retail-tech.html): the counter, rebuilt for the next generation

## Recent articles
- [Fifty percent for Canada: the wall reaches the diamond counter](https://caratcapital.org/a-fifty-percent-for-canada.html): A 50% tariff on Canadian goods takes effect August 19 and names six jewelry HTS codes, loose polished diamonds among them. Rough is exempt, 
- [Twelve and a half for color: Washington prices the rainbow](https://caratcapital.org/a-twelve-point-five-for-color.html): USTR's expedited Section 301 investigation proposes 12.5% tariffs on colored gemstones and cultured pearls from roughly 46 countries, with r
- [Oil talks, gold listens: $4,165 was the top, for now](https://caratcapital.org/a-oil-talks-gold-listens.html): Gold backed off Wednesday's two-week peak of $4,165.87 to trade $4,103.39 Thursday morning, down 0.6%, as oil hit a six-week high, two-year 
- [Swatch's split screen: nine percent growth, sixteen million profit](https://caratcapital.org/a-swatch-nine-up-six-down.html): Swatch Group's first half: revenue CHF 3.12 billion, up 2% reported and 9% at constant currency, with the US up 27%, Japan up 20% and Spain 
- [Birks trims the loss by 73 percent: a repair year in Montreal](https://caratcapital.org/a-birks-narrows-by-73.html): Canada's jeweler of record cut its annual net loss to CAD 3.4 million from CAD 12.8 million, on sales of CAD 205.4 million, up 15.5%, with c
- [The $21,650 lemon: Monica Rich Kosann's fruit that opens](https://caratcapital.org/a-fruit-that-opens.html): Three pendants in the Enchanted Garden series — a cherry at $10,985, a pear at $14,500 and a lemon at $21,650 — each a hinged locket conceal

- [The $144 day: gold breaks its quiet week early](https://caratcapital.org/a-gold-goes-144-in-a-day.html): Kitco's late-Tuesday board read $4,131, up 1.33%, after a stretch that ran from $3,998.80 at the low to $4,142.70 at the high. Silver traded
- [Seventy percent old gold: India's counter learns to recycle](https://caratcapital.org/a-india-pays-in-old-gold.html): The World Gold Council's July update shows imports down 42% in June to $1.97 billion, the lowest since June 2025, while some retailers repor
- [Gold up fifty, diamonds down fifty-eight: Luk Fook's split quarter](https://caratcapital.org/a-gold-up-fifty-diamonds-down.html): Retail sales rose 32% in April-June and gold same-store sales gained 50%, but diamond same-store sales fell 17% group-wide and 58% on the ma
- [‘Disposable tools’: the miners’ union answers De Beers](https://caratcapital.org/a-disposable-tools-at-venetia.html): The National Union of Mineworkers has condemned the two-year Venetia pause that puts 1,134 mine employees and 80 sales staff into consultati
- [Sixty-one percent: the aisle has already voted](https://caratcapital.org/a-sixty-one-percent-said-lab.html): The Knot's 2026 Real Weddings study finds 61% of couples who married in 2025 chose lab-grown center stones. Wholesale prices fell 14-15% in 
- [Thirty-five percent at midnight: Brazil's rough rides free](https://caratcapital.org/a-brazil-rough-rides-free.html): A 25% Section 301 tariff on Brazilian goods takes effect July 23, stacking to 35% on polished stones and finished jewelry. Rough gemstones a
- [Graff pins the butterfly: twelve brooches built to tremble](https://caratcapital.org/a-graff-pins-the-butterfly.html): A new high-jewelry capsule revives the 17th-century jabot pin with en tremblant wings, Paraíba tourmalines, invisibly set pink sapphires and
- [Piaget doubles at Bonhams, and the trophy era loosens](https://caratcapital.org/a-piaget-doubles-at-bonhams.html): Record spring sales saw Piaget models double and triple in value, a 1970s Cartier Bamboo Coussin bring $114,800 and a gold Polo Jumbo $33,28
